3225690.name: Agent Forest
3225690.description:
Agent Forest - You will take on the role of an elite agent who went to an infected location in search of credits. Credits are scattered throughout the forest, but you are not alone! Other agents from all over the world are also hunting for wealth, and they will stop at nothing to get it. Destroy competitors, find credits and most importantly you need to stay safe. Also, in addition to people, there are infected insects that are also hunting you!

The game is a TDS shooter with a top view, you have to shoot back from many enemies and complete the task!

Features of the game:
- Nice graphics
- Interesting fights with enemies
- Excellent soundtrack

Are you ready to become the best agent and get all the credits?
